ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game ID */,
  "fmbtd" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles during the game */,
  "inttd" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions during the game */,
  "othtd" INTEGER /* Other turnovers during the game */,
  "alltd" INTEGER /* Total turnovers during the game */,
  "twopm" INTEGER /* Number of two-point conversions made */,
  "two_pa" INTEGER /* Number of two-point attempts */,
  "sfty" INTEGER /* Number of safeties scored */,
  "offensive_yards" INTEGER /* Total offensive yards gained */,
  "defensive_yards_allowed" INTEGER /* Total defensive yards allowed */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the opposing team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the opponent belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the opponent belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: City where the team is based
Name of the team's head coach
Unique identifier for each performance metric record
Number of fumbles during the game
Number of interceptions during the game
Total points scored in the game
Total points allowed in the game
ID of the team playing the game
Number of spectators attending the game
Duration of the game in minutes
City where the opposing team is based
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin)
Status indicating if the user account is active
